response.justification: Bogdan meets the raw years-of-experience bar (~17 years) and shows genuine breadth across web, infrastructure, and tooling, but the role demands a director-level IC with deep, demonstrated AI expertise and a track record of advising strategic customers on cloud and AI adoption. His AI work is limited to a single current role (since April 2025) focused on MCP tooling rather than platform-scale AI products, he holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and there is no evidence of the executive-facing advisory or thought-leadership profile the position requires.
strengths: 17+ years of hands-on engineering experience across diverse domains including infrastructure, data systems, and product development
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective, multiple open source projects, and conference talks demonstrating a builder and sharer mindset
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq signals active engagement with the AI space
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — no AI products or platforms at scale, no ML background, and no recognized standing in the AI field
Current seniority (Staff Software Engineer) is meaningfully below the director-level IC profile the role targets, with no evidence of strategic customer advisory work
No advanced degree in an AI-related discipline and no cloud architecture depth beyond incidental AWS CDK use

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI depth and track record
Broad engineering tenure and builder mindset
